title: avenella flexuosa subsp. montana
intro: Avenella flexuosa subsp. montana, also known as mountain hair grass, is a subspecies of the Avenella flexuosa plant, a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Avenella flexuosa subsp. montana include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Avenella flexuosa subsp. montana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
